error_signature: The value in "Hello again! How can I help you?" is not set
title: Value not set error in Convert to File node
symptom: The Convert to File node throws an error stating that the value is not set when trying to convert the output of the AI agent into a file.
applies_when: Output from AI agent is expected
not_this_if: Output is correctly set in the node parameters
root_cause: The error occurs because the parameter for the source property in the Convert to File node is incorrectly set. Instead of referencing the output with `{{ $json.output }}`, it should directly reference the property name without the JSON path syntax.
fix_steps: Open the Convert to File node settings
Replace `{{ $json.output }}` with `output` in the source property
agent_instruction: Update the source property in the Convert to File node to reference 'output' directly.
